title: valerianella macrocera
intro: Valerianella macrocera, also known as rough corn salad, is a type of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae. This plant is often used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic and a laxative. The health benefits of Valerianella macrocera include its potential to help lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Valerianella macrocera can be prepared as an herbal supplement in capsule or tea form, and it can also be used as a fresh addition to salads and other dishes.
